title: Horuz

{{Quote|We're dropping you on Horuz. That's one of the dark planets we've been watching.|Saw Gerrera, to Jyn Erso|<ref name="Rebel Rising" />}}
'''Horuz''' was a [[planet]]<ref name="Rebel Rising" /> located in the [[Horuz system]] in the [[Atrivis sector]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories]].<ref name="Systems" /> Horuz was what the [[Partisans]] considered a "dark planet," meaning it was a seemingly insignificant planet that experienced communication blackouts and much higher protocols than normal.<ref name="Rebel Rising" /> In [[7 BBY]],<ref name="Timelines">''[[Star Wars: Timelines]]''</ref> [[Jyn Erso]] was sent on a [[Mission to Horuz|mission]] to Horuz to [[assassin]]ate the Imperial scientist [[Dorin Bell]], who was eventually killed by [[land mine]]s.<ref name="Rebel Rising" /> Shortly before the [[Battle of Scarif]], [[Galactic Empire|Imperial]] [[Imperial Military|forces]] were deployed to Horuz.<ref name="Rogue One novel">[[Rogue One: A Star Wars Story (novelization)|''Rogue One: A Star Wars Story'' novelization]]</ref> In the lead-up to the [[Battle of Jakku]] in [[5 ABY]], Horuz was reportedly to still be in the thrall of either an Imperial remnant or the criminal syndicates and gangs.<ref name="Empire's End">''[[Aftermath: Empire's End]]''</ref>

Horuz's surface included [[cliff]]s, [[canyon]]s, and [[forest]]s.<ref name="Rebel Rising" />
